name: Apple Voice Memo MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Apple Voice Memos on macOS enabling AI agents to list, search, and access voice memo recordings from the local Voice Memos app. Allows AI agents to retrieve transcriptions and metadata from voice recordings stored locally on macOS for productivity and note-taking workflows.
use_cases: Searching and retrieving voice memo transcriptions from productivity agents
Integrating voice recordings into note-taking and knowledge management workflows
Processing meeting recordings captured in Voice Memos with AI agents
Building voice-first capture workflows connected to AI knowledge systems
not_for: Non-macOS systems (Apple Voice Memos is macOS/iOS only, this MCP is macOS)
Cloud-based voice memo services (this accesses local Apple Voice Memos)
Real-time audio processing or transcription (reads existing recordings)
best_when: A macOS user who captures ideas and notes in Apple Voice Memos wants AI agents to search, retrieve, and process those recordings — connecting voice capture to knowledge workflows.
avoid_when: You use other voice recording apps or aren't on macOS. Also consider privacy: voice memos may contain sensitive personal information.

auth.notes: No external auth. Accesses local Voice Memos database. macOS may require permissions for media library access.

pricing.notes: Free open source. Requires macOS with Voice Memos app.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Voice memos may contain highly personal or sensitive recordings
Voice Memos database format can change with macOS updates — test after upgrades
Transcription availability depends on whether Voice Memos auto-transcription is enabled
macOS permissions required for media library access
Niche community tool with limited maintenance — may break on future macOS versions
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Personal voice recordings are highly sensitive. Local-only is a positive, but granting AI agents full voice memo access is a significant privacy decision. Consider limiting to specific folders/date ranges.

security_score_components.security_notes: Personal voice recordings are highly privacy-sensitive. Local-only operation. No external data transmission.
